TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Salman of Saudi Arabia ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 12, Salman of Saudi Arabia, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1935) mrhuw Saudi arabia ta' misuw hya' ga Salman of Saudi Arabia, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: s~…ēalman o* s~…ēau*i araő≤ia rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, s~…ēalman o* s~…ēau*i araő≤ia, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēau*i araő≤ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēalman o* s~…ēau*i araő≤ia, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Salman of Saudi Arabia ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 12, Salman of Saudi Arabia, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1935) mrhuw Saudi arabia ta' misuw hya' ga Salman of Saudi Arabia, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
